features.name: Todo Application
features.description: A Node.js-based Todo app registered as a Datagrok view-application, demonstrating how to build and launch a full UI app from a TypeScript plugin.
features.evidence_summary: The 'todoApplication' function has role='app' and output type 'view'; the readme is titled 'Datagrok Todo App Plugin', directly documenting this entry point.

features.name: Info Panel Demo
features.description: Demonstrates registering a custom context-sensitive info panel (sidebar pane) from a TypeScript Datagrok plugin using the Node.js runtime.
features.evidence_summary: The 'info' function name, combined with four platform docs all covering the info-panel registration pattern, signals this function registers a custom info panel.
